opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The itching is driving me insane, I haven't slept in days, and I'm so exhausted I can't function. It's all over my body and nothing I've tried touches it.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The itch has become unbearable over the last couple of weeks and I've had no sleep — I'm desperate for something that will actually stop it tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: the itching crept in gradually but has gotten dramatically worse over the past 2 weeks; the tiredness has been there for months
symptom_narrative.duration: itch about 2 weeks and much worse; fatigue for months
symptom_narrative.character: a deep, maddening itch all over my skin — not a rash, just relentless itching that makes me scratch until I bleed
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst itching I've ever had — I can't sleep, I scratch all night, and I'm so worn out I can barely get through the day
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, but worst at night when I'm trying to sleep
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — anti-itch creams and strong antihistamines have done absolutely nothing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: night-time and warmth seem to make it worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: really dry eyes and a dry mouth, and I've noticed my skin looks a bit darker even though I haven't been in the sun; I also get a mild ache under my ribs on the right
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: never had itching like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: severe sleep deprivation, I'm exhausted and it's wrecking my mood and ability to cope

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: the lack of sleep from the itching is really affecting my mental health

objective_data_offered.value: widespread scratch marks and broken skin over the arms, trunk and legs from constant scratching
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-shown over video, not a clinician skin examination

objective_data_offered.value: my skin looks a bit darker/duskier than usual and I haven't been in the sun
I've noticed some small soft yellowish patches on my eyelids
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own description of a skin finding, not examined

objective_data_offered.value: the whites of my eyes still look normal to me, not yellow
no fever — I checked at home and it felt normal
lots of empty tubes of over-the-counter anti-itch cream around the bedroom
